headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Mid-America Apartment, Raises Price Target to $147
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   maintains Mid-America Apartment (NYSE:MAA) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $139 to $147.
